title: Senior Plant Manager at Su-Kam Power Systems

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Su-Kam Power Systems
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
